text: Proof-of-Air test. Do EXACTLY this: 1) create file relay/proof/mini-on-air.txt with one line 'Mini executed on the home M4 Air'. 2) git add -A && git -c user.name=Mini -c user.email=warroom@pinla.local commit -m '[Mini] proof: ran on the Air' && git push. 3) bin/warroom-say '[Mini] online ✓ running on the home M4 Air (Codex)'. Nothing else.
